title: Fatsia mitsde

Fatsia mitsde is a perennial plant that grows to a height of around 2-3 meters, with large, dark green leaves and white or greenish flowers. The plant is often grown as an ornamental in gardens and landscapes due to its attractive foliage and ability to thrive in shade. Fatsia mitsde is also known as the Castor Oil Plant, although it is not a true Castor Oil Plant.
